title: Claude Fable 5 Just Changed Website Design Forever
summary: Jack Roberts demonstrates Claude Fable 5's website design generation capabilities through progressive tests, comparing it against Opus 4.8 and showing its ability to replicate design patterns from reference sites. The video argues Fable 5 represents a significant shift in how AI handles web design tasks, with discussion of token efficiency tradeoffs.
writeup: Jack Roberts runs progressive tests of Claude Fable 5 on website design generation, benchmarking it against Opus 4.8 and probing its ability to replicate design patterns drawn from reference sites. The video argues that Fable 5 marks a meaningful shift in how AI handles web design work. Coverage includes the token efficiency tradeoffs involved, touching on prompt engineering and the multimodal handling of visual references.
